TrueKnack Team & Founder's Message

Led by veteran ex-bankers committed to grooming the next generation of retail banking professionals.

Home / Team

Founder's Message

At TrueKnack, our mission is simple: to transform fresh graduates into confident, job-ready retail bankers. Banking is not just a career, it is a discipline of trust, precision, and service. With over 15 years of experience across HDFC Bank, IDFC FIRST Bank, IndusInd Bank, Axis Bank, and Kotak Mahindra Bank, I understand exactly what banks look for. We don't just teach concepts — we prepare you for the floor. The Knack of Finding True Talent is not a tagline, it's our promise.

Deepak Singh PariharFounder – Managing Director & CEO, TrueKnack

Leadership Team

The driving force behind 6,000+ placements in leading private sector banks.

Deepak Singh Parihar

Founder – MD & CEO

Ex. Assistant Vice President in HDFC Bank with 15+ years in BFSI industry under Product, Strategy, Analyst, Sales & Marketing. Also worked with IDFC FIRST Bank, IndusInd Bank, Axis Bank, TATA AIG, Kotak Mahindra Bank & Manipal Global Education Services.

Balasaheb Sopne

Director – Admissions

Ex. Senior Manager in HDFC Bank with 12+ years in BFSI Industry under Sales & Marketing. Also worked with IDFC FIRST Bank, Axis Bank, IndusInd Bank, Yes Bank & ICICI Bank.

Hemant Singh Parihar

Director – Placements & HR

Ex. HRBP in Bandhan Bank with 11+ years in BFSI Industry under HR Business Partnering, Talent Acquisition & Learning Development. Also worked with Axis Bank, HDFC Bank, American Express & Manipal Global Education Services.

First Step Towards a Successful Banking Career

Join 6,000+ graduates already placed in top banks.
